title: NEXSTAND K7 Laptop Stand, Foldable Portable Desktop Laptop Holder with Ventilated Cooling, Ergonomic Laptop Riser for Desk for MacBook and Laptops 10-17"
features: ✅ [Improve Your Posture and Productivity] - Say goodbye to neck, back and shoulder pain caused by laptop use. With Nexstand you can correct your posture and transform your laptop into an ergonomic desktop workstation anywhere. Raise your computer screen up to 15cm off your desk for better ergonomics and maximum comfort.

✅ [Work in Comfort Anywhere] - The K7 laptop stand is lightweight and portable weighing just 200 grams. Its compact and foldable design allows it to fold to a fraction of its size so it can fit easily in your bag, handbag or laptop case. Store it in its nylon carrying case and take it with you anywhere you choose to work from, whether it be at home, the office, co-working space or coffee shop.

✅ [Universal Compatibility] - This desktop stand supports all mainstream laptops 10 inches or larger and with a front-edge less than 3.2cm such as Apple Macbook, Macbook Air, Macbook Pro, iPad, Microsoft Surface Pro, ThinkPad, Lenovo, Asus, Dell, Huawei Laptop, etc.

✅ [Keeps Your Laptop Cool] - Minimal contact on your laptop provides 360 degrees of natural air cooling. This vented laptop stand ensures good airflow so your notebook doesn’t overheat, keeping your hardware and CPU protected and performing at its best.

✅ [Strong, Stable and Easy to Use] - This laptop riser can support up to 9kgs of weight. The skid-free bases and retractable baffles prevent your laptop from wobbling and minimise vibration. One easy and quick action opens and closes the stand. Switch to work mode in a second.
